title: Recover IBC light client for Injective & Elys Network
summary: This proposal updates the expired IBC light client `07-tendermint-0` for counterparty chain `injective-1` with the state of the substitute client `07-tendermint-8`, and IBC light client `07-tendermint-1` for counterparty chain `elys-1` with the state of the substitute client `07-tendermint-7`
